title: SOURCE FATMAN SUBJECT ECONOMICS TOPIC 9 FIVE YEAR PLAN AND I

questions.question: The "Father of Macroeconomics" is considered to be: / "समष्टि अर्थशास्त्र के जनक" किसे माना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Keynes' book 'The General Theory of Employment, Interest and Money' laid the foundation for modern macroeconomics.

questions.question: In the circular flow of income, who are the owners of "Factors of Production"? / आय के चक्रीय प्रवाह में, "उत्पादन के कारकों" के स्वामी कौन हैं?
questions.explanation: Households provide Land, Labour, Capital, and Entrepreneurship to the firms.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a factor of production? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन उत्पादन का कारक नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Land, Labour, Capital, and Entrepreneurship are factors; Profit is the reward for the entrepreneur.

questions.question: "GDP at Market Price" is equal to: / "बाजार मूल्य पर जीडीपी" किसके बराबर है?
options: GDP at Factor Cost - Net Indirect Taxes
GDP at Factor Cost + Net Indirect Taxes
questions.explanation: Market price includes the impact of indirect taxes and subsidies.

questions.question: The value of GDP adjusted for inflation is called: / मुद्रास्फीति के लिए समायोजित जीडीपी के मूल्य को कहा जाता है:
options: Gross National Product / सकल राष्ट्रीय उत्पाद
questions.explanation: Real GDP is calculated using base year prices, reflecting actual growth in production.

questions.question: "Depreciation" is the: / "मूल्यह्रास" (Depreciation) क्या है?
options: Loss of value of fixed assets over time due to wear and tear / टूट-फूट के कारण समय के साथ अचल संपत्तियों के मूल्य में कमी
Tax on profit / लाभ पर कर
Increase in value of assets / संपत्ति के मूल्य में वृद्धि
Cost of raw materials / कच्चे माल की लागत
questions.explanation: Net Investment = Gross Investment - Depreciation.

questions.question: What is "NFIA" (Net Factor Income from Abroad)? / "NFIA" (विदेशों से शुद्ध कारक आय) क्या है?
options: Total foreign aid received / प्राप्त कुल विदेशी सहायता
Income of residents from abroad - Income of non-residents within the country
questions.explanation: NFIA is the key difference between 'Domestic' and 'National' concepts.

questions.question: National Income in India is calculated by: / भारत में राष्ट्रीय आय की गणना किसके द्वारा की जाती है?
options: National Statistical Office/ राष्ट्रीय सांख्यिकी कार्यालय
questions.explanation: NSO (under MoSPI) is the nodal agency for National Account Statistics.

questions.question: The method of calculating National Income by summing up all the payments made to factors of production is: / उत्पादन के कारकों को किए गए सभी भुगतानों को जोड़कर राष्ट्रीय आय की गणना करने की विधि है:
options: Value Added Method / मूल्य वर्धित विधि
questions.explanation: It sums up Rent + Wages + Interest + Profit.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of an "Intermediate Good"? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन "मध्यवर्ती वस्तु" का उदाहरण है?
options: A car used by a family / परिवार द्वारा उपयोग की जाने वाली कार
Flour used by a baker to make bread / ब्रेड बनाने के लिए बेकर द्वारा उपयोग किया जाने वाला आटा
A machine installed in a factory / कारखाने में लगी मशीन
A laptop used by a student / छात्र द्वारा उपयोग किया जाने वाला लैपटॉप
questions.explanation: Intermediate goods are used up in the production process of final goods.

questions.question: "Personal Disposable Income" is: / "व्यक्तिगत प्रयोज्य आय" (Personal Disposable Income) है:
options: Personal Income - Direct Taxes / व्यक्तिगत आय - प्रत्यक्ष कर
questions.explanation: It is the actual amount available to households for consumption and saving.

questions.question: When Net Indirect Taxes are negative, it means: / जब शुद्ध अप्रत्यक्ष कर नकारात्मक होते हैं, तो इसका अर्थ है:
options: Economy is in recession / अर्थव्यवस्था मंदी में है
questions.explanation: Net Indirect Tax = Indirect Tax - Subsidies.

questions.question: "Closed Economy" is one where: / "बंद अर्थव्यवस्था" वह है जहाँ:
options: The government does not interfere / सरकार हस्तक्षेप नहीं करती है
There is no foreign trade / कोई विदेशी व्यापार नहीं होता है
Only exports take place / केवल निर्यात होता है
Only imports take place / केवल आयात होता है
questions.explanation: In a closed economy, GDP = GNP because NFIA is zero.

questions.question: Which of the following is a "Stock" variable? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा "स्टॉक" चर है?
questions.explanation: Stock variables are measured at a particular point in time, while flow variables (like income) are measured over a period of time.

questions.question: "Value Added" is defined as: / "मूल्य वर्धन" (Value Added) को इस प्रकार परिभाषित किया गया है:
questions.explanation: It represents the contribution of a firm to the production process.

questions.question: What is the base year for the current GDP series in India? / भारत में वर्तमान जीडीपी श्रृंखला के लिए आधार वर्ष क्या है?
questions.explanation: The base year was changed to 2011-12 to better reflect the changing structure of the economy.

questions.question: "Transfer Payments" refer to: / "हस्तांतरण भुगतान" (Transfer Payments) का तात्पर्य है:
options: Unilateral payments without any return service / बिना किसी वापसी सेवा के एकपक्षीय भुगतान
International trade payments / अंतर्राष्ट्रीय व्यापार भुगतान
Payments for factor services / कारक सेवाओं के लिए भुगतान
questions.explanation: Scholarships and pensions are transfer payments.

questions.question: Net National Product (NNP) at Factor Cost is also known as: / कारक लागत पर शुद्ध राष्ट्रीय उत्पाद (NNP) को किस रूप में भी जाना जाता है?
options: Gross Value Added / सकल मूल्य वर्धित
questions.explanation: This is the official definition of National Income in economics.

questions.question: The value of final goods and services produced by the normal residents of a country, regardless of where they are located, is: / किसी देश के सामान्य निवासियों द्वारा उत्पादित अंतिम वस्तुओं और सेवाओं का मूल्य, चाहे वे कहीं भी स्थित हों, कहलाता है:
questions.explanation: GNP focuses on the 'Nationality' of the producer.

questions.question: Which of the following is subtracted from GDP to get NDP? / NDP प्राप्त करने के लिए GDP में से निम्नलिखित में से क्या घटाया जाता है?
questions.explanation: Net = Gross - Depreciation.

questions.question: "Mixed Income of Self-employed" is a part of which method? / "स्व-नियोजितों की मिश्रित आय" किस विधि का हिस्सा है?
questions.explanation: It refers to the income of people like farmers or shopkeepers where labor and capital income cannot be separated.

questions.question: Income from "Smuggling" is: / "तस्करी" से होने वाली आय है:
options: Part of GDP / जीडीपी का हिस्सा
Excluded from National Income / राष्ट्रीय आय से बाहर
Included in National Income / राष्ट्रीय आय में शामिल
questions.explanation: Illegal activities are excluded from official national income accounting.

questions.question: If a country's GNP is higher than its GDP, then: / यदि किसी देश का GNP उसके GDP से अधिक है, तो:
options: NFIA is negative / NFIA नकारात्मक है
Depreciation is zero / मूल्यह्रास शून्य है
NFIA is positive / NFIA सकारात्मक है
Net exports are zero / शुद्ध निर्यात शून्य हैं
questions.explanation: It means residents earning abroad earn more than foreigners earning in that country.

questions.question: "GVA" stands for: / "GVA" का अर्थ है:
questions.explanation: GVA provides a sector-wise picture of the economy (Agriculture, Industry, Services).

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT part of the Expenditure Method? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन व्यय विधि का हिस्सा नहीं है?
options: Rent and Interest / किराया और ब्याज
questions.explanation: Rent and Interest are parts of the Income Method.

questions.question: The "Paradox of Thrift" states that: / "किफायत का विरोधाभास" (Paradox of Thrift) कहता है कि:
options: If everyone tries to save more, total savings in the economy may actually fall / यदि हर कोई अधिक बचत करने की कोशिश करता है, तो अर्थव्यवस्था में कुल बचत वास्तव में गिर सकती है
Saving is always good for the economy / बचत हमेशा अर्थव्यवस्था के लिए अच्छी होती है
Spending leads to poverty / खर्च से गरीबी आती है
Investment is equal to savings / निवेश बचत के बराबर है
questions.explanation: High savings reduce aggregate demand, leading to lower production and lower total income.

questions.question: "Factor Cost" does NOT include: / "कारक लागत" (Factor Cost) में शामिल नहीं है:
questions.explanation: Indirect taxes are added to factor cost to reach market price.

questions.question: "Inventory" is considered a: / "इन्वेंटरी" (तैयार माल का स्टॉक) माना जाता है:
questions.explanation: It is the stock of unsold goods at a specific point in time.

questions.question: The difference between National Income and Personal Income is mainly due to: / राष्ट्रीय आय और व्यक्तिगत आय के बीच का अंतर मुख्य रूप से किसके कारण होता है?
options: Direct Taxes on individuals / व्यक्तियों पर प्रत्यक्ष कर
Corporate Taxes and Undistributed Profits / कॉर्पोरेट कर और अवितरित लाभ
questions.explanation: National income belongs to factors, but some part (like corporate tax) never reaches the households.

questions.question: When real GDP increases while nominal GDP remains constant, it indicates: / जब वास्तविक जीडीपी बढ़ती है जबकि नाममात्र जीडीपी स्थिर रहती है, तो यह दर्शाता है:
questions.explanation: If production (Real) increases but the total value at current prices (Nominal) is same, prices must have fallen.

questions.question: Consider the following statements regarding the "Circular Flow of Income" in a two-sector economy: / द्वि-क्षेत्रीय अर्थव्यवस्था में "आय के चक्रीय प्रवाह" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार करें: Statement 1: Households provide factor services to firms. / कथन 1: परिवार फर्मों को कारक सेवाएं प्रदान करते हैं। Statement 2: Firms provide goods and services to households. / कथन 2: फर्में परिवारों को वस्तुएं और सेवाएं प्रदान करती हैं। Statement 3: Real flow refers to the flow of money between sectors. / कथन 3: वास्तविक प्रवाह (Real flow) क्षेत्रों के बीच धन के प्रवाह को संदर्भित करता है। Q31. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Statement 3 is false; Real flow refers to the flow of goods and services, while Money flow refers to the flow of payments.

questions.question: Assertion (A): GDP is a better measure of domestic economic activity than GNP. / अभिकथन (A): जीडीपी जीएनपी की तुलना में घरेलू आर्थिक गतिविधि का बेहतर माप है। Reason (R): GDP includes all production within the geographical boundaries of a country, regardless of who produces it. / कारण (R): जीडीपी देश की भौगोलिक सीमाओं के भीतर सभी उत्पादन को शामिल करती है, चाहे वह कोई भी उत्पादित करे। Q32. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: GDP focus is on 'Location' (Territory), making it ideal for tracking domestic performance.

questions.question: Match the concept with its effect on National Income: / अवधारणा को राष्ट्रीय आय पर उसके प्रभाव के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I | List II 1. Increase in Depreciation | A. Decreases Net National Product 2. Increase in NFIA | B. Increases National Income 3. Increase in Subsidies (at MP) | C. Decreases Market Price of goods Q33. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: Depreciation reduces Net value; NFIA adds to National value; Subsidies lower the market price.

questions.question: Regarding "Final Goods", which of the following is/are correct? / "अंतिम वस्तुओं" के संबंध में, निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा/से सही है/हैं? 1. They are meant for final consumption or investment. / वे अंतिम उपभोग या निवेश के लिए होते हैं। 2. They have crossed the boundary line of production. / उन्होंने उत्पादन की सीमा रेखा पार कर ली है। 3. Their value is included in the National Income. / उनका मूल्य राष्ट्रीय आय में शामिल है। Q34. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Intermediate goods are excluded to avoid double counting.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Transfer payments are excluded from National Income. / अभिकथन (A): हस्तांतरण भुगतान को राष्ट्रीय आय से बाहर रखा गया है। Reason (R): They do not correspond to any production of goods or services in the current year. / कारण (R): वे चालू वर्ष में वस्तुओं या सेवाओं के किसी भी उत्पादन के अनुरूप नहीं हैं। Q35. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: National income measures the value of "production," not just the movement of money.

questions.question: Arrange the following components to arrive at "Personal Disposable Income" from "National Income": / "राष्ट्रीय आय" से "व्यक्तिगत प्रयोज्य आय" तक पहुँचने के लिए निम्नलिखित घटकों को व्यवस्थित करें: 1. Subtract Undistributed Profits. / अवितरित लाभ घटाएं। 2. Subtract Corporate Taxes. / कॉर्पोरेट कर घटाएं। 3. Add Transfer Payments. / हस्तांतरण भुगतान जोड़ें। 4. Subtract Personal Direct Taxes. / व्यक्तिगत प्रत्यक्ष कर घटाएं। Q36. Choose the correct sequence / सही क्रम चुनें
questions.explanation: National Income -> Personal Income (subtract taxes/profits, add transfers) -> Disposable Income (subtract direct taxes).

questions.question: Identify the correct pair regarding "Domestic Territory": / "घरेलू क्षेत्र" के संबंध में सही जोड़ी की पहचान करें: 1. Indian Embassy in USA - Part of Indian Territory / अमेरिका में भारतीय दूतावास - भारतीय क्षेत्र का हिस्सा 2. Foreign Embassy in India - Part of Indian Territory / भारत में विदेशी दूतावास - भारतीय क्षेत्र का हिस्सा 3. Indian aircraft flying between London and Paris - Part of Indian Territory / लंदन और पेरिस के बीच उड़ने वाला भारतीय विमान - भारतीय क्षेत्र का हिस्सा Q37. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Embassies are considered territory of the country they represent, not the host country.

questions.question: Assertion (A): If the GDP Deflator is 120, it means prices have risen by 20% since the base year. / अभिकथन (A): यदि जीडीपी डिफ्लेटर 120 है, तो इसका मतलब है कि आधार वर्ष से कीमतें 20% बढ़ गई हैं। Reason (R): GDP Deflator = (Nominal GDP / Real GDP) × 100. / कारण (R): जीडीपी डिफ्लेटर = (नाममात्र जीडीपी / वास्तविक जीडीपी) × 100। Q38. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: It is a comprehensive measure of inflation.

questions.question: Which of the following actions will "Increase" the National Income? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी कार्रवाई राष्ट्रीय आय में "वृद्धि" करेगी? 1. Construction of a new bridge by the government. / सरकार द्वारा नए पुल का निर्माण। 2. Winning a lottery. / लॉटरी जीतना। 3. Sale of an old house. / पुराने घर की बिक्री। Q39. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: 2 is a windfall gain; 3 is a sale of an existing asset. Only 1 represents new production.

questions.question: Match the Economic Identity: / आर्थिक पहचान सुमेलित करें: List I | List II 1. Gross Investment | A. Net Investment + Depreciation 2. Market Price | B. Factor Cost + Net Indirect Taxes 3. National Product | C. Domestic Product + NFIA Q40. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: These are basic conversion rules for National Income accounting.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Real GDP is always lower than Nominal GDP in an inflationary economy. / अभिकथन (A): मुद्रास्फीति वाली अर्थव्यवस्था में रियल जीडीपी हमेशा नॉमिनल जीडीपी से कम होती है। Reason (R): Real GDP is calculated at constant prices, while Nominal GDP is at current (higher) prices. / कारण (R): रियल जीडीपी स्थिर कीमतों पर गणना की जाती है, जबकि नॉमिनल जीडीपी वर्तमान (उच्च) कीमतों पर होती है। Q41. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: In the current year, Nominal includes the 'price rise' component which Real excludes.

questions.question: Regarding "GVA at Basic Prices", consider the following: / "मूल कीमतों पर GVA" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित पर विचार करें: Statement 1: It includes production taxes. / कथन 1: इसमें उत्पादन कर (Production taxes) शामिल हैं। Statement 2: It excludes product taxes like GST. / कथन 2: इसमें GST जैसे उत्पाद कर (Product taxes) शामिल नहीं हैं। Statement 3: It is the link between GVA at Factor Cost and GVA at Market Price. / कथन 3: यह कारक लागत पर GVA और बाजार मूल्य पर GVA के बीच की कड़ी है। Q42. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Basic Price = Factor Cost + Production Tax - Production Subsidy. Market Price = Basic Price + Product Tax - Product Subsidy.

questions.question: Match the Sector with its typical production activity: / क्षेत्र को उसकी विशिष्ट उत्पादन गतिविधि के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I (Sector) | List II (Activity) 1. Primary | A. Manufacturing clothes 2. Secondary | B. Growing wheat 3. Tertiary | C. Banking and Insurance Q43. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: Primary is extraction of natural resources; Secondary is processing; Tertiary is services.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Intermediate consumption is subtracted while calculating Value Added. / अभिकथन (A): मूल्य वर्धन की गणना करते समय मध्यवर्ती उपभोग को घटाया जाता है। Reason (R): Including it would lead to the problem of "Double Counting." / कारण (R): इसे शामिल करने से "दोहरी गणना" की समस्या होगी। Q44. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: For example, the value of bread already includes the value of flour; counting both separately is wrong.

questions.question: Which of the following are "Leakages" from the circular flow of income? / आय के चक्रीय प्रवाह में "रिसाव" (Leakages) निम्नलिखित में से कौन से हैं? 1. Savings. / बचत। 2. Taxes. / कर। 3. Imports. / आयात। 4. Exports. / निर्यात। Q45. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Leakages reduce the amount of money circulating in the domestic economy.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Capital formation is a flow variable. / अभिकथन (A): पूंजी निर्माण (Investment) एक प्रवाह चर (Flow variable) है। Reason (R): It is measured over a period of time. / कारण (R): इसे एक समयावधि में मापा जाता है। Q46. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Investment adds to the "Stock" of capital.

questions.question: Identify the correct sequence of sectors contributing to India's GDP (Highest to Lowest): / भारत की जीडीपी में योगदान देने वाले क्षेत्रों के सही क्रम की पहचान करें (उच्चतम से निम्नतम): 1. Services / सेवा 2. Industry / उद्योग 3. Agriculture / कृषि Q47. Choose the correct sequence / सही क्रम चुनें
questions.explanation: Services contribute more than 50% to India's GVA.

questions.question: Match the type of Economy with its definition: / अर्थव्यवस्था के प्रकार को उसकी परिभाषा के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I | List II 1. Market Economy | A. Decisions taken by the government 2. Command Economy | B. Decisions taken by market forces 3. Mixed Economy | C. Both government and market coexist Q48. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: India is a Mixed Economy.

questions.question: Assertion (A): The value of services of a housewife is not included in National Income. / अभिकथन (A): गृहिणी की सेवाओं का मूल्य राष्ट्रीय आय में शामिल नहीं किया जाता है। Reason (R): It is difficult to estimate the market value of non-marketed services. / कारण (R): गैर-विपणन सेवाओं के बाजार मूल्य का अनुमान लगाना मुश्किल है। Q49. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: This is one of the limitations of National Income accounting.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct regarding "Disposable Income"? / "प्रयोज्य आय" (Disposable Income) के संबंध में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा सही है? 1. It is the income available for final consumption. / यह अंतिम उपभोग के लिए उपलब्ध आय है। 2. It is equal to Consumption + Savings. / यह उपभोग + बचत के बराबर है। 3. It is always higher than National Income. / यह हमेशा राष्ट्रीय आय से अधिक होती है। Q50. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Statement 3 is false; Disposable income is usually lower than National income due to taxes.
